What We Do

Complete Aircon Services

From cleaning to installation, repair to freon charging — we handle everything your aircon needs.

General Cleaning

Full disassembly, coil washing, blower fan cleaning, drain pan sanitizing, and performance test. Covers split type, window type, cassette type, and floor mounted units — all brands.

Repair

Not cooling? Leaking? Making noise? We diagnose and fix common aircon issues on the spot — same day service available for all unit types.

Installation

New aircon unit setup including copper piping, wiring, outdoor bracket, circuit breaker, and drain line. Window, split type, and floor mounted.

Preventive Maintenance

Scheduled check-ups, refrigerant level check, electrical inspection, and full unit performance testing to extend your AC's life.

Charging of Freon

Refrigerant recharging for all AC types and brands. Restores cooling capacity and prevents compressor damage from low freon levels.

HVAC Maintenance

Commercial-grade HVAC system maintenance for offices and buildings. Includes full inspection, cleaning, and performance report.

Dismantle

Safe and complete removal of your aircon unit — indoor and outdoor components. Ideal when moving out, renovating, or replacing your unit.

Relocation

Moving your aircon to a new room or new home? We handle the full dismantle and reinstallation — properly and safely.

Check Up

Quick diagnostic check of your aircon unit — refrigerant pressure, electrical components, and cooling performance. Know what's wrong before it gets worse.
